title: Find opportunities to become a supplier with the Ministry of Defence

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content:
Leaflet explaining how suppliers can work with the Ministry of Defence (MOD). Helping suppliers new to Defence understand the different ways of working with us, from joining supplier forums to bidding for contracts. This leaflet was issued by Commercial X .

Find opportunities to become a supplier with the Ministry of Defence

sections.heading: Key details
sections.content:
PDF, 679 KB, 8 pages

This file may not be suitable for users of assistive technology.

Request an accessible format.
If you use assistive technology (such as a screen reader) and need a version of this document in a more accessible format, please email ddc-modinternet@mod.gov.uk. Please tell us what format you need. It will help us if you say what assistive technology you use.

sourceReferences.citationText: mod-press-office – Promotional material: Find opportunities to become a supplier with the Ministry of Defence
